SESSION.NAME: defaultSession
SESSION.DESCRIPTION: This diagnostic session enables the default diagnostic session in the server(s) and does not support any diagnostic application timeout handling provisions (e.g., TesterPresent service is not necessary to keep the session active). A server shall always start the default diagnostic session when powered up. If no other diagnostic session is started, then the default diagnostic session shall be running as long as the server is powered.

SESSION.NAME: programmingSession
SESSION.DESCRIPTION: This diagnosticSession enables all diagnostic services required to support the memory programming of a server. Regardless of whether the programmingSession runs in boot software or not, the ECU shall automatically suspend logging of DTCs and suspend transmission of non-diagnostic frames when entering the programmingSession.

SESSION.NAME: extendedDiagnosticSession
SESSION.DESCRIPTION: This diagnosticSession is used to either enable timed diagnostic service functionality (e.g., I/O control) or performing services requiring secure access to the ECU (writing to ECU memory or executing type 1 or type 2 routines). The diagnostic functionality in this session shall also include all supported diagnostic functionality supported in the defaultSession.

SECURITY_LEVEL.NAME: Send Key (Security Level 0x01)
SECURITY_LEVEL.DESCRIPTION: Used for Programming the ECU only.

DATA_FORMAT_IDENTIFIER.NAME: No Compression Method and No Encryption Method

DID.NAME: Number of Trouble Codes Set due to Diagnostic Test

SUB_FIELD.NAME: Number of Trouble Codes Set due to Diagnostic Test

DID.NAME: Tire Pressure Monitoring System (TPMS) Radio Frequency Receiver (RFR) Sensor ID #1

SUB_FIELD.NAME: Tire Pressure Monitoring System (TPMS) Radio Frequency Receiver (RFR) Sensor ID #1

SUB_FIELD.NAME: Last Received Transmitter ID Code (TIC) Value

DID.NAME: Number of Programmed Remote Keyless Entry Transmittters

SUB_FIELD.NAME: Number of Programmed Remote Keyless Entry Transmittters

ENUM_MEMBER.DESCRIPTION: Validation Application Routine Not Executed This Session

DID.NAME: In-Use Application Signing Public Key Hash

SUB_FIELD.NAME: In-Use Application Signing Public Key Hash

DID.NAME: OTA ProgrammingSession Entry And A/B Swap Precondition Status

SUB_FIELD.NAME: Steering Pinsion Torque Out of Range
Engine RPM Too High (or Torque Available)
Park Brake Out of Range or Activation in Progress
Loop-Time overflow or scheduler idle time overflow Counter
TPM KOL HIB KeyOff Start Time CARMode
TPMS Lost UHF Reset Time CFG
TPM Polling Hibernate ON cycle time value
TPM Polling Hibernate On/Off Cycling KeyOff Start time (KOL_Mode) value
TPM Polling Max Key Off Operation time (CAR_Mode)
TPM Polling Max Key Off Operation time (KOL_Mode)

DID.NAME: Subsystem Specific Diagnostic Specification Part Number

SUB_FIELD.NAME: Subsystem Specific Diagnostic Specification Part Number

DID.NAME: NOS Network Management Junior Version Number
NOS Bootloader Generation Tool Version Number

SUB_FIELD.NAME: NOS Bootloader Generation Tool Version Number
Number Of Modules (ISO14229 compatibility - always set to 01h)
Boot Software Identifcation Data (Part no. of the bootloader)

DID.NAME: ECU - PBL SW Part Number - Supplier
ECU - Base Model Part number - Supplier

SUB_FIELD.NAME: Aptiv Base Model ECU Part Number

DID.NAME: MCU Logic SW Part number - Supplier

SUB_FIELD.NAME: First two digits of version number
Second two digits of version number

DID.NAME: ECU UHF IC User Flash SW Build ID

SUB_FIELD.NAME: ECU UHF IC User Flash SW Build ID

DID.NAME: Remote Keyless Entry (RKE) Last RX RF Data Message
Remote Keyless Entry (RKE) Last Received Action Code

SUB_FIELD.NAME: Last Local Power Mode state history

DID.NAME: RSSI Avg for Last RX RKE Data Message

SUB_FIELD.NAME: RKE TIC for RSSI Average Value

DID.NAME: RSSI Avg for Last RX TPM Data Message

SUB_FIELD.NAME: TPM ID for RSSI Average Value

DID.NAME: Runtime measurement: Max. interrupt lock time

SUB_FIELD.NAME: Runtime measurement: Max. interrupt lock time

DID.NAME: Tire Pressure Management (TPM) Last RX RF Data Message

ENUM_MEMBER.DESCRIPTION: "0 to 57.50psig" Range Or Low Pressure Sensor
"57.50 to 115psig" Range Or "0.0 to 115psig" for High Pressure Sensor
Normal-Rotation Unknown/No Measurement- Factory True - DSL
Normal-Rotation Unknown/No Measurement- Factory True - DSL

SUB_FIELD.NAME: Last $331 Remote Device Feedback CAN signal data

DID.NAME: KLine TX Data - 2nd to Last Message
KLine RX Data - 2nd to Last Message

SUB_FIELD.NAME: KLine RX Data - 2nd to Last Message
Register PEPS Rx Timer start value
PS-PE-Diag PEPS RX Timer start value
PEPS RX Approach 1-2 fob time value
PEPS RX Approach 3 fob time value
PEPS RX Approach 4+ fob time value

DID.NAME: RKE Action Type Clear timer value

SUB_FIELD.NAME: RKE Action Type Clear timer value

DTC_FAILURE_TYPE.DESCRIPTION: Alive / Sequence Counter Incorrect / Not Updated

DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.NAME: Operation cycle counter #2
DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.DESCRIPTION: Number of operation cycles since the DTC fault detection counter last reached its maximum value of +127 (since DTC information was last cleared). The operation cycles during which the test was not completed shall be excluded

DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.NAME: DTC Fault Detection Counter
DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.DESCRIPTION: The purpose of this counter is to provide a mechanism for filtering the results of a low-level fault detection process so that test results (pass and fail) can be qualified before setting any DTC status bits.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Serial Data Gateway "A"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: DTCCtrl_85 = Enabled && DTC_LS = False && DTCMask_Cfg Bit 6 = 1-Enabled && IgnSts_Sys = $4-RUN for >= 5 seconds
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: FAIL= $3B3 CAN message is missing for full test period duration PASS = $3B3 message is received during test period
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: RKE and TPM Monitoring may not function

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Invalid Data Received from ECM/PCM A

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: DTCCtrl_85 = Enabled && DTC_LS = False && DTCMask_Cfg Bit 6 = 1-Enabled && IgnSts_Sys = $4-RUN for >= 5 seconds
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: Event based on reception of $42E CAN Message
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: FAIL : Received $42E Veh_V_Actl_Eng_D_Qf CAN Signal = 0x0 PASS Received $42E Veh_V_Actl_Eng_D_Qf CAN signal <> 0x0
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: TPM Warning telltale may illuminate as the RF mode determination may not function properly.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: DTCCtrl_85 = Enabled && DTC_LS = False && DTCMask_Cfg Bit 5 = 1-Enabled && IgnSts_Sys = $4-RUN for >= 5 seconds
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: Event based on reception of $42E CAN Message
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: FAIL : Received $42E Veh_V_Actl_Eng_D_UB CAN Signal = 0x0 PASS Received $42E Veh_V_Actl_Eng_D_UB CAN signal <> 0x0
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: TPM Warning telltale may illuminate as the RF mode determination may not function properly.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: DTCCtrl_85 = Enabled && DTC_LS = False && DTCMask_Cfg Bit 4 = 1-Enabled
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: Event based on Kline Tx or Rx event
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: FAIL : The Kline Bus Reset Operation Counter reaches 0x0 value PASS: Valid Kline Rx occurs
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: RKE , PEPS and TPM monitoring will not function

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Test occurs following Initialization of Main Application SW
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: FAIL: HWSWVal_Fault = True (HWSWVal_KeyChk_x != HWSWVAl_Key) PASS: HWSWVal_Fault = False (HWSWVal_KeyChk_x == HWSWVal_Key) X = variant A, B, C, or D.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Limit operation to Diagnostic operation only.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: RKE, PEPS operation will not operate. TPMS Warning light may activate as TPMS reception is not functioning

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: FAIL: NVM Read Fault Flag = False && FactoryCfg_Status != 0x5A5AA5A5 PASS: FactoryCfg_Status = 0x5A5AA5A5
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: RKE operation may not function for South Korean export vehicles

ROUTINE.NAME: Restore Initial ECU Configuration To Not Complete State

ENUM_MEMBER.DESCRIPTION: Valid Application Software is NOT Present

ROUTINE.NAME: Clear RKE TIC - TPM ID Data

ENUM_MEMBER.DESCRIPTION: Purge both RKE TIC and TPM ID Data

ROUTINE.NAME: Manufacturing calculation of Software Strategy Checksum
MFG I/O: UHF IC programming Status
MCU Op Status - Interrupt Run Time measurement.
MCU Op Status - Task Runtime Measurement
